name: Rendani Mbuvha
affiliation: UNU-INWEH · Queen Mary University of London
bio: Research Fellow in Artificial Intelligence and Applied Statistics at UNU-INWEH, building machine-learning tools to understand climate risk, floods, heatwaves, and drought.

name: Vukosi Marivate
affiliation: University of Pretoria · ABSA UP Chair of Data Science
bio: Professor of Computer Science at the University of Pretoria, focused on machine learning, NLP, and African language technologies that support social impact.

name: Catherine Nakalembe
bio: Assistant professor and Africa Program Director at NASA Harvest, using satellite data and AI to strengthen food security and agricultural decision-making.

name: Loubna Benabbou
bio: Professor in optimization and machine learning whose work spans decision systems, rule extraction, and data-driven methods for complex scheduling problems.
